title: Curver Paper Bin Knit 23, 1x23, 9x27, 2cm in Blue
description: From the manufacturer Curver Knit Round Basket Curver's Knit range is inspired by the art and nostalgia of knitted fabrics. Made from durable and durable plastic with a natural wide weave knit pattern, the Knit range is practical and elegant. The round mesh storage basket is multifunctional and can be used to neatly store all those pieces such as perfume, nail polish or toiletries. Whether it's keeping all your bathroom accessories together or being used in your office to keep your stationery tidy and easily accessible, this versatile basket has the storage solution you're looking for. Made of durable plastic, this basket is easy to clean and will stay beautiful longer.
